title: Bridge Paper: Toward a brain theory of meditation.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Non-fabrication** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Spontaneous thought — mind-wandering, default mode network, creative cognition, involuntary thought.
**Phase context:** spontaneous thought, mind-wandering, creative cognition, default mode network, involuntary thought, daydreaming

Paper: Toward a brain theory of meditation.
DOI: 10.1016/bs.pbr.2018.10.028
Abstract: The rapidly progressing science of meditation has led to insights about the neural correlates of focused attention meditation (FAM), open monitoring meditation (OMM), compassion meditation (CM) and loving kindness meditation (LKM), in terms of states and traits. However, a unified theoretical understanding of the brain mechanisms involved in meditation-related functions, including mindfulness, is lacking.
